# One-Step Polish 3in1

## Medium Cut polish – high-gloss finish and seal in one

An unbeatable all-arounder. Polish out sanding marks caused by 3000 grit, reliably remove smears, swirls, and shadows, and protect the high-gloss finish – all with a single product. This one-step polish combines speed and simplicity, making it ideal for novice polishers and the detailing of used and year-old vehicles.

Multi-stage premium polish

### Processing

- **Rotary:**
At the start: 1,250–1,500 rpm
Towards the end: 500–800 rpm

- **Orbital:**
Medium to lower rotational speed range

- **By hand: **
Medium pressure with circular motions 

### Volumes

| 250ml

| 22748.281.001

| 1l

| 22748.261.001

### Service life

1 month

### Cut/Gloss

5/9

### Steps

**Step 1**

Heavy Cut

**Step 2**

Medium Cut

**Step 3**

Finish

**Step 4**

Protection

## More information

- [Benefits](javascript:;)

- [Recommended usage](javascript:;)

- [Process Example](javascript:;)

Benefits

- One-step polish: Polish, finish, and seal 
- Removal of sanding marks (3000 grit) 
- Speedy high-gloss finish 

- Noticeably smoother finish 
- Can be overpainted 
- Silicone-free 

Recommended usage

- Clean the surface thoroughly. 
- Shake the bottle before use and apply the polish to the Medium Cut Foam Pad. 
- We recommend a rotary or orbital polishing machine and the cross-coating method to achieve a perfect result. The polish can also be applied by hand using the Hand Polishing Applicator. 
- While polishing, exert moderately strong pressure to begin with, using the medium rotational speed range of the polishing machine. Reduce the pressure and the rotational speed during the final cycles. 
- At first, the polish will seem a little greasy and should be worked in until only a slightly transparent/oily film is visible. 
- Following application: Leave OSP 3in1 to dry for 5 to 10 minutes and remove any residual polish with the Premium microfiber cloth, without applying any pressure. 
- Depending on the demands of the surface, the 3in1 product can be reapplied using the Wax Foam Pad in order to achieve an even better finish.

FAQ

## Questions & answers

Do you have a question? We have the answer. On our FAQ page you will find frequently asked questions with the corresponding answers.

[To the FAQs](/car-care/training-tips/faqs)

[Can I apply Menzerna polish by hand?](javascript:;)

Yes, Menzerna car polishes can also be used for polishing by hand. In particular, [Medium Cut 2400](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/medium-cut-polish-2400), [One-Step Polish 3in1](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/one-step-polish-3in1) and all Finish polishes and sealants are ideal for application by hand.

[When should I polish my car?](javascript:;)

If your car has scratches or if the paint is lackluster and has lost its shine, then a professional car polish can restore the paint to its former glory.

[How do I polish a car at home?](javascript:;)

If you plan to polish your car at home, you should do so at a location protected from environmental influences. The most suitable place is a garage in which you can optimally illuminate the vehicle. Alternatively, you could polish the car under a carport. The car should never be polished in direct sunlight.

[How do I, as a beginner, polish my car?](javascript:;)

For polishing beginners who are working with a polishing machine for the first time, we recommend starting with an orbital polishing machine and the [Menzerna One-Step Polish 3in1](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/one-step-polish-3in1). In combination with the 3in1, the [Medium Cut Foam Pad](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/medium-cut-foam-pad) would be the right choice. Distribute the fine abrasive polish evenly over the paint and polish with light to medium pressure. Detailed recommendations can be found on the [product page](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/one-step-polish-3in1).

[Which products are suitable for sticky paint?](javascript:;)

The [One-Step Polish 3in1](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/one-step-polish-3in1), [MCP 2400](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/medium-cut-polish-2400) and [SF 3500](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/super-finish-3500) car polishes are ideal for sticky paint.

Always up to date

## Register for the newsletter now!

Subscribe now to the free Menzerna Newsletter and receive interesting tips and information about polishing.

[To the newsletter](/service/newsletter)

## Car polish OSP 3in1

One-Step Polish 3in1 by Menzerna polishes scratches, generates gloss, and protects the car coat – in just a single step. The polish is easy to use and is ideal for inexperienced polishers. It is suitable for use with both a polishing machine as well as by hand. This one-step automotive polish is a secret weapon when dealing with sticky paint.

![image](/typo3conf/ext/pp_products/Resources/Public/images/loader-spinner.svg)
